Puget Sound Energy — on PSE's petition for an order authorizing deferred accounting treatment for PSE's share of certain costs (5 pp). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: WA UTC document API (apiproxy.utc.wa.gov/cases/GetDocument?docID=4536&year=2022&docketNumber=220066).

findings.title: Approval: $88 million
findings.summary: o be known and measurable, used and useful, and prudent. 3 Staff explains that PSE pursued multiple grant opportunities in excess of $88 million and that of the 19 grant applications submitted, eight were successful.
